languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Губернатор-полковник Куравич{/d} с отрядом бойцов закрепились на востоке, у главных ворот, и держат оборону. Он как раз принимал поставку грузов, когда все началось".

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Губернатор-полковник Куравич{/d} с отрядом бойцов закрепились на востоке, у главных ворот, и держат оборону. Он как раз принимал поставку грузов, когда все началось".

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

"Colonel-Governor Kuravich, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."
"He was just taking delivery of cargo from another settlement at the gate when it all started. Knowing the old grouser, he's probably defending the cargo like his life depends on it."

"Colonel-Governor Kuravich, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

"Colonel-Governor Kuravich, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

languages.text: 「ゲートで別の集落から荷物を引き取っていた時、すべてが始まった。あの頑固な男なら、荷物を守るだろう。命がけで。」
languages.original_text: "He was just taking delivery of cargo from another settlement at the gate when it all started. Knowing the old grouser, he's probably defending the cargo like his life depends on it."

traits.locale_text: 「ゲートで別の集落から荷物を引き取っていた時、すべてが始まった。あの頑固な男なら、荷物を守るだろう。命がけで。」

languages.text: «El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}coronel-gobernador Kuravich{/d}, acompañado de un destacamento, ha asegurado la puerta principal al este y mantiene una posición defensiva. Estaba recibiendo suministros cuando empezó todo esto».
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

traits.locale_text: «El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}coronel-gobernador Kuravich{/d}, acompañado de un destacamento, ha asegurado la puerta principal al este y mantiene una posición defensiva. Estaba recibiendo suministros cuando empezó todo esto».

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Gouverneur Kuravich{/d} hat mit einer Abteilung Soldaten das östliche Haupttor gesichert und hält dort die Stellung. Er sollte gerade Nachschub erhalten, als es losging."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

traits.locale_text: "Colonel-Gouverneur Kuravich hat mit einer Abteilung Soldaten das östliche Haupttor gesichert und hält dort die Stellung. Er sollte gerade Nachschub erhalten, als es losging."

languages.text: « Le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}colonel-gouverneur Kuravich{/d}, accompagné d'un détachement de soldats, a sécurisé les portes principales de l'est et défend maintenant cette position. Il était en train de réceptionner une livraison quand tout a commencé. »
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

traits.locale_text: « Le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}colonel-gouverneur Kuravich{/d}, accompagné d'un détachement de soldats, a sécurisé les portes principales de l'est et défend maintenant cette position. Il était en train de réceptionner une livraison quand tout a commencé. »

languages.text: “总督上校{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}库拉维奇{/d}，带着一支小队守住了东侧主门，现在正据守防线。袭击发生时，他正好在接受空投下来的补给。”
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."

traits.locale_text: “总督上校{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}库拉维奇{/d}，带着一支小队守住了东侧主门，现在正据守防线。袭击发生时，他正好在接受空投下来的补给。”

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Vali Albay Kuravich{/d}, bir müfreze askerle birlikte doğudaki ana kapıları emniyete aldı. Hattı tutuyor. Her şey başladığında bir ikmal sandığını teslim almakla meşguldü."
